## Cloudflare–OpenAI Partnership Draws Valuation Question on AI Agent Infrastructure Upside

If the OpenAI partnership is already priced in, incremental upside requires either a usage ramp or expansion of partnership scope; PM should assess what evidence of under-pricing, if any, remains in the forward setup.

- Cloudflare is tied to an OpenAI partnership framed as relevant to AI agent infrastructure positioning.
- Coverage questions whether the upside from this partnership is already reflected in NET's valuation.
- The agent_framework_landscape tag indicates this is read as a structural positioning story, not a one-off event.
